role: Identity, tenant membership, launch/session/service identity, platform admin, and account authority.
release_must_not_violate: Keep launch and authority truthful without recreating product entitlements for ordinary products.

role: People, roles, permissions context, org structure, sites, locations, incidents, and delegated account workflows.
release_must_not_violate: Remain the shared people/location authority while product actions stay owned by the product performing them.

role: Document metadata, files, versions, record packets, retention, evidence references, and audit packages.
release_must_not_violate: Replace any in-memory/file-prototype truth before products rely on evidence persistence.

role: Regulatory meaning, applicability, citations, rulepacks, evidence requirements, questionnaires, and normalized compliance facts.
release_must_not_violate: Keep administrative authoring platform-admin-only while runtime guidance serves all products.

role: Assets, defects, inspections, preventive maintenance, work orders, readiness, downtime, and maintenance execution.
release_must_not_violate: Prove asset-to-work-to-evidence without stealing inventory, training, quality, or document truth.

role: Training definitions, assignments, evaluation, certificates, qualifications, remediation, and renewals.
release_must_not_violate: Own qualification truth while StaffArr owns people and incidents.

entry_stage_title: Procure, receive, put away, reserve, and issue
role: Suppliers, vendors, procurement expectations, purchase requests/orders, sourcing, pricing, and lead-time context.
release_must_not_violate: Own commercial/procurement truth while LoadArr owns physical inventory and CustomArr owns customers.

entry_stage_title: Procure, receive, put away, reserve, and issue
role: Receiving, putaway, locations-as-references, item balances, stock ledger, reservations, picks, issues, transfers, counts, and discrepancies.
release_must_not_violate: Replace fixture/no-op/local-success behavior before any production inventory reliance.

entry_stage_title: Quality hold, release, and corrective action
role: Nonconformance, quality holds, releases, CAPA, audits, findings, complaints, supplier quality, and quality status.
release_must_not_violate: Block and release via permissioned, evidenced quality decisions rather than shadow-owning affected records.

role: Customer accounts, contacts, locations, requirements, contracts, preferences, onboarding, eligibility, and CRM/customer portal context.
release_must_not_violate: Be the customer source of truth before OrdArr, RoutArr, or SupplyArr consumes customer requirements.

role: Orders, requests, order lifecycle, triage, handoffs, exception coordination, completion packets, and bill-ready intent.
release_must_not_violate: Explain why work is happening while execution products own how work is performed.

role: Transportation demand, dispatch, routes, trips, stops, driver/equipment snapshots, exceptions, proof, dock visibility, and freight packets.
release_must_not_violate: Dispatch only against explicit readiness snapshots from owning products.

role: Mobile assigned work, secure capture/upload, offline queueing, sync, scanning, and product action surfaces.
release_must_not_violate: Never become a mobile source of truth; replay all actions through owning APIs.

role: Read models, dashboards, metrics, scheduled reports, exports, provenance drillbacks, and audit-ready report outputs.
release_must_not_violate: ReportArr projects and explains source truth; it must not correct source truth.

role: Legal entities, books, dimensions, financial packet governance, posting rules, AP/AR/inventory valuation snapshots, and external ERP bridges.
release_must_not_violate: Start bridge-first; do not absorb operating truth or become a full ERP gravity well prematurely.

entry_stage_title: Expansion, portals, advanced integrations, AI, and category depth
role: Public marketing, product/industry pages, legal/trust content, lead inquiry, and site-to-CustomArr handoff.
release_must_not_violate: Market the staged product truth without promising unshipped operational loops.
